hooks.command: sh -c 'sh .spec-first/hooks/task-context.sh || echo "spec-first: task-context hook 执行失败（已降级）" >&2'
sh -c 'FEAT=$(head -1 .spec-first/current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FEAT" ] && npx spec-first gate check "$FEAT" || echo "spec-first: 跳过 gate 检查（无当前 feature）"'

sh -c 'FEAT=$(head -1 .spec-first/current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FEAT" ]; then npx spec-first matrix check "$FEAT" || echo "spec-first: matrix check 执行失败（已降级）" >&2; else echo "spec-first: 跳过 matrix 检查（无当前 feature）"; fi'
sh -c 'sh .spec-first/hooks/progress-sync.sh || echo "spec-first: progress-sync hook 执行失败（已降级）" >&2'
sh -c 'FEAT=$(head -1 .spec-first/current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FEAT" ] && npx spec-first ai stats "$FEAT" >/dev/null || true'
